scratchpadContent:
New behavior = feat
Bug gone = fix
Same behavior, cleaner code = refactor
Same behavior, faster code = perf
Only whitespace/formatting = style
Only markdown/comments = docs
Only tests = test
Build/deploy config = build or ci
Everything else = chore

replayFlash: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:slot-machine replayFlash &&
 qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:slot-machine toggle && sleep 0.32 && niri msg action screenshot
